hero.headline: Explore possible Australian visa pathways with current structured visa data
hero.subheadline: Review general information for Student, employer sponsored, skilled, regional and partner onshore pathways before speaking with a registered migration agent.
trustIndicators.gov: Based on official Australian government sources
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Tell us your study, work, skilled, regional or partner pathway goal
howItWorks.step2: We compare your answers against structured visa information
howItWorks.step3: See pathways that may be relevant based on the stored information
howItWorks.step4: Speak with a registered migration agent if needed
pathways.title: Supported pathways
pathways.subtitle: The platform currently uses structured records for these six visa pathways. Each summary is general information only and should be reviewed with a registered migration agent for personal circumstances.
pathways.500.title: 500 Student visa
pathways.500.text: Study in Australia through the current Student visa record.
pathways.482.title: 482 Skills in Demand
pathways.482.text: Employer sponsored work pathway using the Core Skills stream record.
pathways.189.title: 189 Skilled Independent
pathways.190.title: 190 Skilled Nominated
pathways.190.text: State or territory nominated skilled pathway information.
pathways.491.title: 491 Skilled Work Regional
pathways.820801.title: 820/801 Partner onshore
pathways.820801.text: Onshore partner pathway covering temporary 820 and permanent 801 stages.
cta.title: Choose a starting point
cta.checker.title: Pathway checker
cta.checker.text: Answer guided questions and explore possible pathways.
cta.checker.label: Open checker
cta.assistant.title: AI assistant
cta.assistant.text: Ask questions grounded in the stored visa records.
cta.assistant.label: Ask assistant
cta.points.title: Points calculator
cta.points.text: Estimate points for skilled pathways 189, 190 and 491.
cta.points.label: Estimate points
cta.occupation.title: Occupation checker
cta.occupation.text: Check occupation matches for skilled and sponsored pathways.
cta.occupation.label: Check occupation
cta.agent.title: Agent referral
cta.agent.text: Request to speak with a registered migration agent.
cta.agent.label: Request referral
assistantCta.title: Ask about a supported pathway
assistantCta.text: The assistant can summarise stored information for 500, 482, 189, 190, 491 and 820/801. It keeps answers to general information only and points you to source records.
assistantCta.label: Open assistant
languages.title: Multilingual support
compliance.title: Compliance Notice
compliance.text: This platform provides general information only. It does not make visa decisions, prepare applications, or replace professional review. For personal circumstances, speak with a registered migration agent or Australian legal practitioner.
referral.title: Need personalised help?
referral.text: We can help you request contact with a registered migration agent after you review general pathway information.
footer.disclaimer: For full legal information, view our
checker.heading: Visa Pathway Checker
checker.title: Check my visa options
checker.subtitle: This questionnaire provides general information only and helps you explore possible pathways.
checker.sponsor: Do you have an Australian employer sponsor?
checker.familyInAustralia: Do you have a partner/family member in Australia?
results.heading: General pathway summary
results.title: Your mock pathway results
results.subtitle: Based on your answers, the following pathways may be relevant and could be worth reviewing with a registered migration agent.
results.nextText: Prepare your missing documents and discuss these possible pathways with a registered migration agent before making visa decisions.
legal.heading: Legal and Compliance
legal.title: Information use and platform boundaries
legal.subtitle: This platform is designed for general information and eligibility pre-screening only. It is not a migration advice or legal advice service.
legal.whatDoesText1: Provides general pathway summaries using structured public visa data.
legal.whatDoesText2: Highlights missing information and discussion points for your next step.
legal.whatDoesText3: Offers optional referral pathways to registered migration professionals.
legal.whatDoesNot: What this platform does not do
legal.whatDoesNotText1: Does not provide migration advice or legal advice.
legal.whatDoesNotText2: Does not confirm visa eligibility, outcomes, or approvals.
legal.whatDoesNotText3: Does not replace consultation with a registered migration agent.
